name: kyw-dev
description: Spec-driven development workflows for durable docs, verified Tasks, and audits.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, execute, and audit spec-driven work.
interface.longDescription: Provides explicit workflows to initialize durable project truth, atomically author dependency-aware Task sets, execute one verified Task at a time, and independently audit the resulting evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use $kyw-init to initialize this repository's durable documents.
Use $kyw-task to create the smallest ready Task set and execute its first eligible Task.
Use $kyw-audit 0001 to audit Task 0001 without modifying the repository.
